title: Fair wage
description: Add's Numismatic Overhaul compatibility to Bountiful
body:
# Fair wage **Notice: From version 1.20 onwards, Bountiful includes a built-in data pack for compatibility.** This pack uses Silver Coins, but you can choose to replace them with Bronze. To do so, ensure you deselect the built-in pack before placing Fairwage into your world's data pack menu. Adds numeric overhaul and bountiful compatibility to ensure that the bounty Board isn't useless by replacing emeralds and other such payouts with numeric overhaul equivalents
Feedback
